top_signals.title: Shortsighted stock market can no longer brush off war: 'It's too hard to ignore $100 oil'
top_signals.summary: After staying flat as the U.S.-Iran war heated up again, equities tumbled on Thursday after oil prices crossed $100 per barrel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US weapons makers’ sales soar as Iran war boosts order backlog
top_signals.summary: Pentagon is pushing major defence contractors to increase production rates to rebuild depleted stockpiles
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russian hackers exploit Zimbra zero-click flaw for email theft
top_signals.summary: CISA is warning that the Russian state-sponsored hacking group Laundry Bear, also known as Void Blizzard, is targeting organizations using Zimbra Collaboration email servers by combining phishing attacks with the exploitation of a now-patched Zimbra vulnerability. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BTC treasury firm Empery Digital invests $20M in AI data center developer Cardinal Data Power
top_signals.summary: The investment marks Empery’s latest push into AI infrastructure as the company shifts capital away from its Bitcoin treasury strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Geely and Ford team up to revive Spanish auto plant
Here’s why the CLARITY Act’s ethics deal may be so hard to reach
top_signals.summary: Both parties say they want US crypto market structure legislation, but a dispute over ethics rules and who enforces them is becoming the bill’s biggest obstacle.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Former head of Japanese barbecue chain arrested over tax evasion
top_signals.summary: The 55-year-old former president of New Look is suspected of evading some ¥367 million in income tax by concealing about ¥2.276 billion in income in 2023.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
